sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20603" key="boulhgo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουλ-ηγόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who speaks in the Senate</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
